meaning: n.泰勒(m.) n.(共济会的)秘密会所看守人
examples: The cyclists were together until the bend, when Tyler pulled ahead.
I said to him, "Tyler, why not join in our discussion instead of having one of your own?"
The violence in her tone gave Tyler a shock.
After all, with grandkids named Madison, Tyler and Haley, why shouldn't grandmothers go by Mimi.
Tyler, born Gaynor Hopkins in Neath, Wales, had her first hit single, Lost in France, in 1976.
